Print method for harbour metadata

Source: R/metadata.R
print.harbour_metadata.Rd

Print method for harbour metadata

Usage

# S3 method for class 'harbour_metadata'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A harbour_metadata object.

...

Unused.

Value

Invisibly returns x.

See also

Other metadata: as_tibble.harbour_metadata(), hb_column_types(), hb_list_collaborators(), hb_list_tables(), hb_metadata(), is_harbour_metadata(), summary.harbour_metadata()
